en_title: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 Enlists It and Annabelle Writer for Its Script
cn_title: 《小丑回魂》编剧加盟《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》
subtitle: 新鲜血液
opus_summary: 据好莱坞报道者，Gary Dauberman将为《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》编剧，导演Emma Tammi有望回归，Scott Cawthon任制片。

paragraphs.en: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 has reportedly tapped It and Annabelle scribe Gary Dauberman to write its script.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》已选定《小丑回魂》和《安娜贝尔》的编剧Gary Dauberman来撰写剧本。

paragraphs.en: Blumhouse Atomic Monster and Universal seem to have made their first real move for yet another sequel in their series of video game-to-movie adaptations, according to Dread Central (via The Hollywood Reporter ). It's a sign not only that work on the next FNaF movie is underway but that the team is looking to spice up Freddy Fazbear's Pizza this time around.
paragraphs.cn: 据Dread Central通过《好莱坞报道者》的消息，Blumhouse Atomic Monster与环球似乎已为这一游戏改编电影系列的又一部续集迈出了实质性的第一步。这标志着不仅下一部《玩具熊的五夜后宫》电影已在推进，而且团队这次似乎打算给Freddy Fazbear's Pizza添些新花样。

paragraphs.en: Dauberman's resume includes credits on projects like the 2017 It reboot, its sequel, and 2014's Annabelle. He also helped write The Nun and last year's Until Dawn movie and is attached to the upcoming Street Fighter and Helldivers films .
paragraphs.cn: Dauberman的作品履历包括2017年《小丑回魂》重启版及其续集，以及2014年的《安娜贝尔》。他还参与了《修女》和去年上映的《直到黎明》电影的编剧工作，并且已确认加盟即将推出的《街头霸王》和《地狱潜者》电影。

paragraphs.en: The first Five Nights at Freddy's film , which premiered in 2023, was co-written by creator Scott Cawthon and director Emma Tammi. Its sequel then followed in 2025 and was written by Seth Cuddeback. It's unclear if Dauberman will write the new script alone as Blumhouse and Universal attempt to reanimate the franchise's terrifying animatronic for Five Nights at Freddy's 3.
paragraphs.cn: 首部《玩具熊的五夜后宫》电影于2023年上映，由系列创作者Scott Cawthon与导演Emma Tammi联合编剧；续集则在2025年接踵而至，由Seth Cuddeback执笔。目前尚不清楚在Blumhouse与环球试图让该系列那台恐怖的机械玩偶在《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》中再度复活的背景下，Dauberman是否会独自完成新剧本。

paragraphs.en: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 has not been formally announced, but it wouldn't be a surprise to see it get the green light. The first two movies were tremendous successes, with the first quickly becoming Blumhouse's biggest ever at the time , and the sequel bringing in a solid opening haul , too. Global box office totals saw Five Nights at Freddy's 1 finish with $291.5 million and Five Nights at Freddy's 2 finish with $238.5 million, according to Box Office Mojo.
paragraphs.cn: 《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》尚未正式公布，但倘若获得绿灯也并不令人意外。前两部电影都取得了巨大成功，第一部迅速成为Blumhouse当时票房最高的影片，续集同样收获了相当可观的开画成绩。据Box Office Mojo数据，第一部全球票房达2.915亿美元(约合人民币20亿元)，第二部达到2.385亿美元(约合人民币16亿元)。

paragraphs.en: The Hollywood Reporter says that, should work on Five Nights at Freddy's 3 move forward, Tammi, who directed the first two films, is expected to return. Cawthon is also expected to be involved as a producer. Although stars like Josh Hutcherson, Piper Rubio, and Elizabeth Lail have not officially signed on for another installment, the site says "many are expected" to return, too.
paragraphs.cn: 《好莱坞报道者》指出，若《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》继续推进，执导前两部影片的Tammi有望回归，Cawthon也预计将以制片人身份参与。尽管Josh Hutcherson、Piper Rubio和Elizabeth Lail等主演尚未正式签约下一部，但该网站表示「还有多人有望」一同回归。

paragraphs.en: Even as audiences have flocked to see Freddy, Chica, Foxy, and Bonnie hit the big screen, the movies have been notoriously panned by critics. Movie review aggregator Rotten Tomatoes has the first currently sitting at a 33% critic score and 85% audience score , with ratings for the second at 17% from critics and 82% from audiences . IGN gave FNaF 1 a 4/10 and FNaF 2 a 3/10 .
paragraphs.cn: 尽管观众们成群结队地涌进影院观看Freddy、Chica、Foxy和Bonnie登上大银幕，这两部电影却遭到了评论界近乎一致的差评。电影评论聚合网站烂番茄显示，第一部目前评论家评分仅33%，观众评分85%；第二部评论家评分更是跌至17%，观众评分82%。IGN则给第一部打了4/10，第二部3/10。

paragraphs.en: Blumhouse Atomic Monster and Universal may be hoping to even out those scores as Dauberman gives Five Nights at Freddy's 3 some fresh blood. For more, you can check out our worst-reviewed movies of 2025 .
paragraphs.cn: Blumhouse Atomic Monster与环球或许寄望于Dauberman能为《玩具熊的五夜后宫3》注入新鲜血液，从而拉平这些评分。
